Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class QueueMembers

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.QueueMembers
public class QueueMembers extends Object

Java class for QueueMembers complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="QueueMembers">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="publicGroups" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PublicGroups" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="roleAndSubordinates" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RoleAndSubordinates" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="roleAndSubordinatesInternal" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RoleAndSubordinatesInternal" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="roles" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Roles" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="users" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Users" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
